items.name: ❄️「Frostveil Coat [PBR]」❄️
items.description:
A luxurious long coat wrapped in soft fur trim, designed to keep you warm in the harshest of winters.
The flowing silhouette and plush textures create a balance of elegance and coziness — perfect for icy kingdoms, magical adventures, or winter fashion statements.
✨ Features
Long robe-style coat with fur-lined cuffs and collar
Elegant and cozy PBR texture work
Perfect for fantasy, RPG, or seasonal outfits
Adds a regal, wintery flair to your avatar
🔍 Keywords: winter coat, fur trim, fantasy, elegant, snow, PBR

items.name: Irregular Choice Purple Winged Backpack
items.description: Make every outfit an Irregular Choice with this statement Purple Winged backpack, exclusively at Hex Mall. Designed to turn heads, this bold black backpack features the iconic Irregular Choice handwritten logo with a playful heart detail, paired with a shimmering purple front pocket for extra sparkle.

items.name: Irregular Choice Starry Love Jumpsuit
items.description: Show off your bold style with the Starry Love Jumpsuit! This eye-catching outfit features a pattern of blue and white stars, bringing a touch of the cosmos to your Roblox wardrobe. The standout detail is a big, bright red heart decal on the chest, adding a fun and playful pop of color. Perfect for Robloxians who love making a statement, this jumpsuit combines celestial vibes with a touch of sweetness. Whether you’re exploring or hanging out with friends, the Starry Love Jumpsuit is sure to keep you looking cool and feeling cozy!
